<!-- indicator: fig-language-proficiency -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-language-proficiency
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Population that Speaks English "Less Than Very Well", 5 Years and Older, 2021–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Population that Speaks English "Less Than Very Well", 5 Years and Older, 2021–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-language-proficiency", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
